items.title: Roknifard: US-Iran Talks Only Substantial If Fights Stop
items.summary: US & Iran have agreed to cease attacking each other as peace talks resume. The exchange of attacks began over the Strait of Hormuz after the IRGC struck a container ship, prompting Washington to hit Iran, and both sides blaming the other for breaching the ceasefire. Julia Roknifard, Senior Lecturer at the School of Law & Governance at Taylor's University, Malaysia spoke to Bloomberg’s Jennifer Zab

items.title: Pakistan Urgently Seeks LNG as Hormuz Flare-Up Chokes Supply
items.summary: Pakistan is seeking to buy liquefied natural gas for delivery this week as a string of attacks in the Strait of Hormuz disrupts flows of the super-chilled fuel.

items.title: Hormuz Traffic Drops Off as Vessel Attacks Raise Fresh Concerns
items.summary: Commercial traffic through the Strait of Hormuz persisted at a reduced level after attacks on two ships raised fresh concerns about the ability and willingness of shipowners to traverse the waterway.

items.title: US, Iran Agree to Halt Attacks Ahead of Talks
items.summary: The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues, paving the way to end days of tit-for-tat attacks that tested a fragile truce. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Падение украинских дронов в странах НАТО — это «приемлемая цена» за удары по России, заявил гл [...]
items.summary: Падение украинских дронов в странах НАТО — это «приемлемая цена» за удары по России, заявил глава МИД Эстонии.Маргус Цахкна призвал Украину не отказываться от атак на российские объекты, даже если некоторые БПЛА окажутся на территории стран Балтии, пишет FT. «Конечно, мы не рады [таким инцидентам], но мы не просим Украину прекращать это», — добавил Цахкна.
